nodes.name: Laniarius
nodes.summary: Laniarius（Laniarius）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联22种鸟类，如Red-naped bushshrike、Black boubou、Lühder's bushshrike等22种鸟类。

nodes.name: Yellow-breasted boubou
nodes.summary: Yellow-breasted boubou（Laniarius atroflavus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yellow-breasted boubou。

nodes.name: Yellow-breasted boubou
nodes.summary: The yellow-breasted boubou (Laniarius atroflavus) is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae. Ecology and distribution It is found in the Cameroonian Highlands forests on Mt. Cameroon and the adjacent Cameroon highlands. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, subtropical or tropical moist shrubland, and subtropical or tropical high-elevation shrubland. The species is monotypic and sedentary. Behaviour Breeding November marks the start of the breeding season, which is typically ends in late March. Two eggs are present in the clutch. References
